channel.title: Sell In Public Blog
channel.description: Research-backed notes on employee-generated content, B2B social strategy, examples, and useful editorial checklists.

item.title: Best Agency For Founder-Led LinkedIn Content: How To Choose
item.description: The best agency for founder-led LinkedIn content depends on the job you need done: personal executive presence, founder voice, sales follow-up, or a managed LinkedIn-led GTM motion.

item.title: Why Founder Posts Get Low Engagement On LinkedIn
item.description: Founder LinkedIn posts usually fail because the system around the post is weak: wrong reader, weak first line, thin point of view, no team loop, and the wrong scorecard.

item.title: LinkedIn Employee Advocacy For B2B Revenue Teams
item.description: Run LinkedIn employee advocacy around buyer moments, credible employees, useful participation, and sales signals.

item.title: How To Scale Employee-Generated Content On LinkedIn
item.description: A weekly operating model for choosing credible employees, capturing expertise, publishing profile-native LinkedIn posts, and measuring buyer response.

item.title: Virio Vs Other LinkedIn Content Agencies: How To Compare The Options
item.description: Compare Virio with AI LinkedIn tools, founder ghostwriters, employee advocacy platforms, and managed outbound services by the job each provider actually does.

item.title: Founder Content Vs Employee Content
item.description: Founder-led content sets the point of view. Employee-generated content proves how the team thinks. Here is when B2B companies should use each model.

item.title: How To Grow AI Search Visibility With LinkedIn Content
item.description: A practical guide for B2B teams that want LinkedIn content to support AI search visibility without pretending social posts replace owned answer assets.

item.title: LinkedIn Content Infrastructure For B2B Sales Teams
item.description: Build a LinkedIn content operating loop around buyer questions, credible voices, profile standards, review, measurement, and repurposing.

item.title: How To Measure Employee-Generated Content Beyond Impressions
item.description: A practical model for measuring employee-generated content across buyer-fit engagement, pipeline influence, sales reuse, trust, search visibility, and AI visibility.

item.title: How To Turn Employee Expertise Into Useful LinkedIn Posts
item.description: Turn raw employee expertise into specific LinkedIn posts by capturing real work moments, asking for judgment, editing for clarity, and preserving the employee's voice.

item.title: Employee-Generated Content Examples From B2B Companies
item.description: A practical examples page for B2B teams, with direct public posts and source-backed lessons from Clay, Lovable, GitLab, and Shopify Engineering.

item.title: Employee-Generated Content vs Employee Advocacy
item.description: Employee-generated content starts with employee expertise. Employee advocacy starts with a company-approved message. Here is how B2B teams should choose between them.

item.title: What Is Employee-Generated Content?
item.description: A practical definition with source-backed examples from Clay, Lovable, GitLab, and Shopify, plus a checklist for creating useful employee-led content from real expertise.
